untranslatable_reason: Channel pattern requires identification of upper and lower trend lines, which cannot be expressed with available indicators. The signal depends on visual pattern recognition of two parallel trend lines, bounce detection off the lower line, and price turning down at the upper line. These require either custom trend line detection or linear regression indicators not available in the allowed set.
translation_notes: Attempted proxy using pivot levels (r1 as upper resistance, s1 as lower support) and price position reversal logic, but this does not accurately capture the dual-trend-line channel pattern described. A proper implementation would require custom trend line indicators or a linear regression-based channel detector. The progressive stop logic ('raise stop to just below prior minor high') also cannot be precisely coded without lookback window parameters for identifying minor highs.
